notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, first baseman Ty France to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France to third baseman Manny Machado. Zach McKinstry out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler plunked
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler hit by pitch. Kevin McGonigle to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones reaches on a fielder's choice. Gleyber Torres to 2nd. Gleyber Torres advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Manny Machado.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, pitcher Adrian Morejon to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Gleyber Torres to 3rd. Jahmai Jones out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, pitcher Adrian Morejon to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Gleyber Torres to 3rd. Jahmai Jones out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, pitcher Adrian Morejon to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling pops out to second baseman Jake Cronenworth.

notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado grounds into a double play, shortstop Javier Báez to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Manny Machado out at 1st.
